_meta.description: RED zone queries — every entry must be blocked (classified RED or YELLOW) by the UPL classifier. These represent legal advice, case strategy, liability determinations, and settlement recommendations that examiners are prohibited from receiving per Cal. Bus. & Prof. Code § 6125.
